mapper.select: SELECT binding_id, binding_name, domain_type, feature_key, system_template_id, user_template_id, runtime_profile_id, description, is_active, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id FROM tb_mst_ai_prompt_binding WHERE 1=1 AND is_active = 1 AND is_active = 0 AND domain_type = #{domainType} ORDER BY binding_id DESC

SELECT binding_id, binding_name, domain_type, feature_key, system_template_id, user_template_id, runtime_profile_id, description, is_active, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id FROM tb_mst_ai_prompt_binding WHERE binding_id = #{bindingId}

SELECT binding_id, binding_name, domain_type, feature_key, system_template_id, user_template_id, runtime_profile_id, description, is_active, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id FROM tb_mst_ai_prompt_binding WHERE domain_type = #{domainType} AND feature_key = #{featureKey} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mst_ai_prompt_binding ( binding_name, domain_type, feature_key, system_template_id, user_template_id, runtime_profile_id, description, is_active, created_id, updated_id ) VALUES ( #{bindingName}, #{domainType}, #{featureKey}, #{systemTemplateId}, #{userTemplateId}, #{runtimeProfileId}, #{description}, #{isActive}, #{createdId}, #{updatedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mst_ai_prompt_binding SET binding_name = #{bindingName}, domain_type = #{domainType}, system_template_id = #{systemTemplateId}, user_template_id = #{userTemplateId}, runtime_profile_id = #{runtimeProfileId}, description = #{description}, updated_id = #{updatedId} WHERE binding_id = #{bindingId}
